_meta.purpose: Standardized MTM feature flag schema for backhoe loader listings. Maps dealer listing language to canonical flag names. Used for search matching, autofill, and use-case scoring.
_meta.source: Synthesized from MachineryTrader, TractorHouse, EquipmentTrader, Facebook Marketplace, Ritchie Bros, IronPlanet listing analysis.

4wd.label: 4-Wheel Drive
4wd.notes: Standard on most full-size backhoes; increases traction value significantly in wet/muddy applications

2wd.label: 2-Wheel Drive
2wd.notes: Lower acquisition cost; acceptable for road work, paved sites, dry stable ground

powershift_transmission.label: Powershift Transmission
powershift_transmission.notes: Highly desirable; faster direction changes, easier to operate, less operator fatigue vs synchromesh

ride_control.label: Ride Control
ride_control.notes: Popular feature for load-and-carry work; reduces spillage and operator fatigue while roading

limited_slip.label: Limited Slip / Differential Lock
limited_slip.notes: Improves traction in soft or uneven terrain

pilot_controls.label: Pilot Controls
pilot_controls.notes: Premium feature; reduces operator fatigue, faster cycles, highly preferred by experienced operators and rental companies

mechanical_controls.label: Mechanical Controls
mechanical_controls.notes: Standard on most entry-level and rental-grade machines

pattern_select.label: Pattern Select / Dual Pattern
pattern_select.notes: Allows operators to switch between SAE (Case) and ISO (excavator) control patterns

extendahoe.label: Extendahoe / Extendable Dipper
extendahoe.notes: Adds 3-4 ft of dig depth; essential for deep utility work. One of the most searched features on listings.

side_shift.label: Side Shift Boom
side_shift.notes: Allows digging parallel to structures or walls; JCB specialty; popular in utility and construction against buildings

quick_coupler_rear.label: Quick Coupler (Backhoe)
quick_coupler_rear.notes: Speeds up bucket and attachment changes; nearly universal on late-model machines

hydraulic_thumb.label: Hydraulic Thumb
hydraulic_thumb.notes: Dramatically increases versatility for demo, debris clearing, brush, rock. Strong positive listing signal.

mechanical_thumb.label: Mechanical Thumb
mechanical_thumb.notes: Less desirable than hydraulic thumb but still adds value for material handling

rear_aux_hydraulics.label: Auxiliary Hydraulics (Rear / Backhoe)
rear_aux_hydraulics.notes: Required for hammer, compactor, auger use. Strong positive signal; most serious utility operators require this.

front_aux_hydraulics.label: Front Auxiliary Hydraulics (Loader)
front_aux_hydraulics.notes: Enables powered loader attachments (brooms, blades, forks). Less common than rear aux.

4in1_bucket.label: 4-in-1 / Multi-Purpose Loader Bucket
4in1_bucket.notes: Adds grab/clam functionality; popular in demo, cleanup, material handling. Frequently listed as premium feature.

quick_coupler_front.label: Quick Coupler (Loader)
quick_coupler_front.notes: Skid steer-compatible quick attach on compact TLBs (Kubota, JCB 1CXT) is a strong selling point for attachment versatility

pallet_forks.label: Pallet Forks
pallet_forks.notes: Increases versatility; frequently mentioned in listings for farm and yard use machines

self_leveling.label: Self-Leveling Loader
self_leveling.notes: Standard on most modern machines; worth noting in listings for older or rental-grade machines that lack it

bucket_12in.label: 12" Backhoe Bucket
bucket_12in.notes: Narrow trenching bucket; utility standard for water/sewer lines

bucket_24in.label: 24" Backhoe Bucket
bucket_24in.notes: General purpose digging; most machines ship with 24"

breaker_hammer.label: Hydraulic Breaker / Hammer
breaker_hammer.notes: Strong listing feature; signals ready-to-work demo capability. Requires rear aux hydraulics.

auger.label: Auger
auger.notes: Popular for fence post, sign, utility pole installation

compaction_wheel.label: Compaction Wheel / Plate
compaction_wheel.notes: Niche but positive for utility contractors

enclosed_cab.label: Enclosed Cab
enclosed_cab.notes: One of the highest-impact listing features for full-size backhoes. Year-round usability. Strong price premium.

ac.label: Air Conditioning
ac.notes: Often listed alongside enclosed cab; critical for summer work and resale value

heat.label: Heat / Heater
heat.notes: Year-round capability signal; especially important in northern markets

air_suspension_seat.label: Air Suspension Seat
air_suspension_seat.notes: Operator comfort feature; more common in premium configurations

radio.label: Radio / Bluetooth
radio.notes: Signals cab comfort; low value impact but positive listing signal

backup_camera.label: Backup / Rear Camera
backup_camera.notes: Increasingly common on newer machines; safety and awareness feature

telematics.label: Telematics / GPS Tracking
telematics.notes: Fleet management value; more important to commercial buyers than individual operators

new_tires.label: New Tires
new_tires.notes: Strong positive signal; backhoe tires are expensive. Frequently mentioned in listings.

tight_pins.label: Tight Pins / Tight Bushings
tight_pins.notes: One of the most important used backhoe signals. Worn pins = expensive rebuild. Sellers who call this out are signaling quality.

no_leaks.label: No Leaks
no_leaks.notes: Critical inspection point on used backhoes; cylinder seal leaks are expensive

fleet_maintained.label: Fleet / Dealer Maintained
fleet_maintained.notes: Strong positive provenance signal; especially powerful for municipal, utility company, contractor fleet machines

one_owner.label: One Owner
one_owner.notes: Standard used equipment signal; more relevant when paired with low hours

ready_to_work.label: Ready to Work
ready_to_work.notes: Strong closing phrase in listings; implies minimal downtime risk

low_hours.label: Low Hours
low_hours.notes: The single biggest used equipment value driver. Under 2,000 hrs for full-size is considered low.

good_undercarriage.label: Good Undercarriage (Tracked)
good_undercarriage.notes: Specific to JCB 1CXT and tracked compact backhoes; tracks are the most expensive wear item

value_impact_legend.high: Frequently cited as decision driver; measurable price premium in used market
value_impact_legend.medium: Positive listing signal; increases buyer interest but smaller price impact
value_impact_legend.low: Nice-to-have; informational but minimal standalone price impact
